evals.prompt: Break this approved PRD into thin vertical implementation issues with dependencies, and show me the breakdown before publishing.
evals.expected_behavior: Proposes tracer-bullet vertical slices (not horizontal layers), each with title, AFK/HITL type, dependencies, user-story coverage, and acceptance criteria, and waits for approval before publishing.
assertions: Breaks work into thin end-to-end vertical slices rather than layer-based tickets
Includes AFK versus HITL classification or equivalent human-review distinction
Presents the breakdown for approval before creating tracker issues

evals.prompt: Publish the approved issue slices to GitHub in dependency order with real blocker references.
evals.expected_behavior: Creates issues in dependency order so blockers reference real IDs, applies only verified labels, and does not invent tracker conventions.
assertions: Publishes or drafts in dependency order
Avoids inventing unverified labels or project fields
Keeps blocker references concrete rather than circular or vague

evals.prompt: Write the PRD for this feature before we decide how to split the work.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes away from to-issues because product framing is still missing.
assertions: Does not invent implementation tickets when a PRD is still needed
Routes toward to-prd or product-requirements work instead
